summary: Iteration 213 - Resonance Compatibility, Balance Score, Suanpan Export Testing Complete. All 23 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Five Elements Wheel with resonance data fetch, Mastery Tier panel with balance score breakdown, Suanpan Trade button with export panel.

minor.issue: Tier boundary gaps cause scores like 40.4 to fall through to 'observer' instead of 'synthesizer'. Boundaries are 0-20, 21-40, 41-60 etc. - scores between boundaries (20.1-20.9, 40.1-40.9) default to observer.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix tier boundary gaps in mastery.py get_tier_for_score() - change 'if t["min"] <= score <= t["max"]' to use >= for min boundary to handle decimal scores
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/botany/resonance/{element} - Returns synergy calculations with synergy_type (harmony/generating/generated_by/controlled/controlling/neutral) - PASS
Resonance endpoint returns forecast (surge/favorable/balanced/strained/depleted) based on net_flow - PASS
Resonance projection shows recommendation for adding same-element plant - PASS
GET /api/mastery/balance-score - Returns balance_score (0-100) with 4-component breakdown - PASS
Balance score formula: diversity(30%) + equilibrium(30%) + consistency(20%) + exploration(20%) - PASS
Balance score derives tier name from score (observer/synthesizer/archivist/navigator/sovereign) - PASS
POST /api/mastery/wheel-interaction - Records element click for diversity tracking - PASS
POST /api/trade-circle/suanpan-export - Creates frequency_recipe listing with auto-derived metadata - PASS
Suanpan export: 528Hz → Fire, 396Hz → Wood, 741Hz → Metal - PASS
Suanpan export tags source as 'suanpan_mixer' - PASS
Frontend: Clicking wheel node triggers resonance data fetch and shows ENERGY FORECAST panel - PASS
Frontend: Mastery Tier panel shows in Botany right sidebar with score breakdown - PASS
Frontend: Suanpan Mixer has Trade button and export panel with recipe name input - PASS
seed_data_creation: Test listings created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 213 added three P1 enhancements: (1) Resonance Compatibility - GET /api/botany/resonance/{element} calculates synergy_type and synergy_score for each garden plant based on Five Elements cycle (generating/controlling relationships). Stage multiplier affects scores. Forecast derived from net_flow (surge/favorable/balanced/strained/depleted). (2) Balance Score - GET /api/mastery/balance-score uses 4 components: diversity(30%), equilibrium(30%), consistency(20%), exploration(20%). Tier boundaries: observer(0-20), synthesizer(21-40), archivist(41-60), navigator(61-80), sovereign(81-100). Note: decimal scores at boundaries may fall through due to integer boundary gaps. (3) Suanpan Export - POST /api/trade-circle/suanpan-export maps frequency to closest Solfeggio, derives element/nature/mass. SOLFEGGIO_MAP: 396=Wood, 528=Fire, 639=Earth, 741=Metal, 852=Water. Source tagged as 'suanpan_mixer'. User currently has 2 garden plants (Mugwort=Fire, Chrysanthemum=Metal) and score ~40.4.

resonance_compatibility.details: Returns synergies array with synergy_type, synergy_score, stage_multiplier. Totals include boost, conflict, net_flow, forecast. Projection shows recommendation for adding same-element plant.

balance_score_endpoint.details: Returns balance_score (0-100), tier, next_tier, points_to_next, breakdown, all_tiers

wheel_interaction_endpoint.details: Records element click for diversity tracking

suanpan_export_endpoint.details: Creates frequency_recipe listing with auto-derived element, nature, mass from frequency

frontend_resonance_panel.details: ENERGY FORECAST panel appears when element is clicked, shows synergies and forecast

frontend_balance_score_panel.details: Mastery Tier panel in right sidebar shows tier name, score bar, and breakdown

frontend_suanpan_export.details: Trade button opens export panel with recipe name input and Export Now button
